steps.title: Match corresponding sides
steps.content: The similarity statement gives $AB$ corresponding to $XY$ and $BC$ corresponding to $YZ$. Use those corresponding pairs in a proportion because similar triangles have equal side ratios.

steps.title: Set up the proportion
steps.content:
The side ratios must match.

$$\frac{AB}{XY}=\frac{BC}{YZ}$$

Substitute the known side lengths.

$$\frac{160}{XY}=\frac{640}{72}$$

steps.title: Solve for the side length
steps.content: Cross multiply and divide to isolate $XY$. $$160(72)=640(XY)$$ $$11{,}520=640(XY)$$ $$18=XY$$ The answer is D.
